about.title: Meet Your Host
about.subtitle: The mind behind Alsaydaliyah — bridging pharma leadership with digital innovation.
about.bio1: Dr. Mina Zakaria is a senior marketing executive and business consultant specializing in the Egyptian pharmaceutical market. Holding a Doctor of Business Administration (DBA) and an MBA, he brings a rigorous, academic approach to complex market operations and enterprise digital transformation.
about.bio2: As the Head of Marketing at PharmaOverseas, Dr. Zakaria's tenure has been hallmarked by crafting dynamic growth strategies and steering the company's digital presence to unprecedented heights. He leads multifaceted teams spanning digital marketing, public relations, customer digital transformation, and customer service.
about.bio3prefix: Driven by a commitment to enhanced customer satisfaction and brand loyalty, Dr. Zakaria's initiatives consistently align with broader corporate visions, ensuring that
about.bio3suffix: are always at the forefront of his operations.
